failing_checks: 15-reader-content-quality controlled launch exact live/audio slug equality
expected_behavior: Regression gates should enforce release truth without requiring source-only PRs to include generated production catalog state.
actual_behavior_before: Exact stale catalog expectations failed even when source-controlled launch data preserved reader-only/audio-hidden policy.
root_cause: Tests mixed production API assertions with source-only PR validation and old static UX implementation details.
fix: Reader-content quality now checks required slugs are included, no duplicates exist, audio-enabled slugs remain live-approved, and Batch 1 reader-only slugs are not audio-enabled.
Migration and URL navigation tests allow PR-mode source-controlled claimable slugs when production API lacks those entries.
Static UX conversion assertions now match the validated hardcopy hero assets, current audio safety component, and current India badge implementation.
release_truth_impact: No tests were weakened to approve audiobooks; audio-enabled and reader-only constraints remain explicit.
